compiled_state.title: As a practitioner, I receive warnings when an agent creates a non-conforming bug ticket
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Done Definitions

- Ticket CLI auto-converts unicode arrow (U+2192) to ASCII -> in titles on create and edit
- Post-creation validation warns (stderr, exit 0) when title does not match [Component]: [Condition] -> [Observed Result]
- Post-creation validation warns (stderr, exit 0) when description missing Expected Behavior or Actual Behavior headers (case-insensitive)
- Post-creation validation warns (stderr, exit 0) when description exceeds 30K characters
- Bugs always created regardless of compliance — warnings never block, exit code always 0
- Title warning configurable via dso-config.conf (bug_report.title_warning_enabled, default: true)

## Scope

In: Unicode arrow conversion, three post-creation warnings (title pattern, description headers, description size), config key for opt-out. All warnings to stderr only.
Out: Template creation (Story 1), skill creation (Story 3), test creation (Story 4).

## Considerations

- Warnings must go to stderr to avoid breaking stdout piping for ticket ID capture
- Case-insensitive header detection to handle markdown formatting variants (## Expected Behavior, **Expected Behavior**, expected behavior)
- Validation added inline to ticket CLI create command output path — no new hook surface needed

## Escalation Policy

Autonomous — Agents proceed with best judgment at all times. Reasonable assumptions are made and documented. No escalation for uncertainty.

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ticket-create.sh auto-converts unicode arrow U+2192 (→) to ASCII -> in titles
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && echo 'test' | bash plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-create.sh bug "Test→Result" 2>/dev/null; true
- [ ] Post-creation validation warns on non-matching title pattern (stderr, exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && grep -q 'stderr\|warning\|warn' plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-create.sh
- [ ] Post-creation validation warns on missing Expected/Actual Behavior headers (stderr, exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && grep -qi 'Expected Behavior\|Actual Behavior' plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-create.sh
- [ ] Post-creation validation warns on description > 30K chars (stderr, exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && grep -q '30' plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-create.sh
- [ ] Title warning configurable via dso-config.conf (bug_report.title_warning_enabled)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && grep -q 'title_warning_enabled\|bug_report' plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-create.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
comments.author: Main

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done — all acceptance criteria verified ✓

comments.body: Fixed: Post-creation CLI validation warnings implemented — unicode arrow conversion, title pattern/description headers/size warnings to stderr, configurable via dso-config.conf.
